steps.title: Use the identical-line condition
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Match the intercept
steps.content:
The given line is
$$y=\frac{2}{5}x+2$$
For $y=mx+b$ to be the same line, the intercept must be $b=2$. The answer is D.
